subject: A robed humanoid figure in the foreground gripping a blade, lit from below by an intense orange-red glow that backlights the silhouette against a fiery, ember-streaked atmosphere
description: A dark, hooded or robed figure occupies the foreground, raising a blade whose edge catches the firelight. The composition is dominated by a churning haze of red, orange, and black — sparks, embers, and smoke fill the background, suggesting either a forge, a burning battlefield, or a hellish sky. The lighting is harsh and chiaroscuro, with the figure rendered in near-silhouette while the surrounding environment radiates infernal heat. The image evokes ritual cruelty and the relish of inflicted pain, matching the flavor text from Judith, the Scourge Diva about searing iron and razor edges.
foreground: robed figure with raised blade, partially silhouetted
background: fiery haze of embers, smoke, and red-orange light
emotion: menacing, deliberate, predatory — the figure savors the moment
